ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Trial Setting
Off Calendar Aug-20-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Peterson for Twila Parker. Ron Schivo for Donna Parker (Trustee).

The Court noted that a jury trial in the civil matter (526951) is set for November 18, 2013 and that the order consolidating the actions was only filed in the probate case. Counsel agreed to a two half day trial in the Probate Department, to direct examination of Witnesses by way of declarations, to waving a jury trial and to proceed pursuant to the shedule as set forth in the Case Management Conference Statement that was filed on August 15, 2013. The trial dates for the Petition for Removal, etc. in 295742 and the rejected Creditor's Claim in 526951 were set for December 13, 2013 and December 20, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court will file an order vacating the November 18th trial date in Department 206. The Petition for Order Cancelling Deed, etc. on calendar for November 27, 2013 was taken off calendar per Mr. Schivo as the issue is now moot.

Judge: Mary Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Loos. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Trial Setting
Off Calendar Jun-18-2013 Continued To Aug-20-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ron Schivo for Donna Parker (Trustee). Robert Peterson for Lauren Saunders (Executor).

Mr. Schivo stated that they are not ready to go to trial, that he will be taking the deposition of Parker Bell Saunders on July 11, 2013, that they will probably be ready in October and mentioned the possibility of entering into stipulation regarding evidence at trial. Counsel stated that they are trying to expidite the matter to be able to do the trial in no more than two half days so that they can remain in this department. Status on trial setting was continued to August 20, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Mann.

Petition By Respondent Trustee Donna Lee Parker For Orders, 1)Canceling Deed 2) Expunging Lis Pendens; And 3) Awarding Attorney Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Nov-14-2012 Advanced From Jan-02-13 To Nov-21-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Removing Trustee, Appointing Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Nov-21-2012 Continued To Mar-20-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ronald Schivo for and with Donna Lee Parker (Trustee). Robert Peterson for and with Lauren Sanders (Executor of the Estate of Twila Adelle Parker).

The Parties agreed to the following: 1) Mr. Schivo is to cancel the deed by November 30, 2012. 2) Mr. Peterson will withdraw the Lis Pendens by December 7, 2012. 3) The Parties selected Barbara Gialatto to be the Realtor. The sale of the property will be approved by both Parties or by Court confirmation. 4) The Parties are to agree on the sale amount in writing. If the property sells for at least the listing price, no consent by Mr. Peterson's Client is needed. If it sells for less, Mr. Peterson's Client must give written consent. 5) If an offer is accepted, a copy of the offer is to be provided to Mr. Peterson within 5-days. 6) Mr. Schivo's Client will advance upto $25,000.00 for costs to prepare the house for sale. Upon receipt of the roofing bill, Lauren will pay $3,000.00 to the Roofer. 7) Out of escrow $3,000.00 may be paid to Lauren and upto $25,000.00 may be paid to Donna, as well as post July 1, 2012 payments by Donna for property taxes, insurance and utilities upon presenting of bills by Licensed Professionals and is to be approved by Mr. Peterson. 8) Remaining funds are to be held in escrow pending joint instructions by Lauren and Donna or Court order. Escrow instructions are to be approved by both Lauren and Donna in writing. 9) No Attorney fees or Trustee fees are to be paid without agreement of the Parties or Court order. The Petition for Order Removing Trustee and the Petition for Orders Cancelling Deed, Expunging Lis Pendens, etc. were continued to March 20, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Parties are to advise the Probate Examiner in advance if more time is needed.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.
